title: Justin's Animated Inventory
description: Gives an animated inventory that's not too intrusive and nice to look at.
body:
Aesthetically pleasing animated inventory created from a gif. Only tested it on 1.21.1 Neoforge. Welcome to test more versions and let me know what works!
**Requires [Animatica](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatica)**

I saw a video by [ISkyslive](https://youtube.com/shorts/kKxrjRQGVPA?si=KxnSsYXoVfdU6ZEs) on youtube but couldn't find the download so I made it myself. Enjoy!
